title: Calypso 2 report published
body: "Today, we have published our accident investigation report into the double fatality and subsequent loss of the small commercial vessel Calypso 2 on 11 March 2023, near West End on the north-west coast of Anguilla.   The report, available via this link, contains details of what happened, subsequent actions taken and recommendations.   This investigation was carried out by the UK Marine Accident Investigation Branch (MAIB) on behalf of the Governor of Anguilla in accordance with the Memorandum of Understanding between the MAIB and the Red Ensign Group Category 2 registry, The Anguilla Maritime Administration.   Media enquiries (telephone only)       Media enquiries during office hours 01932 440015   Media enquiries out of hours 0300 7777878      "
